app.title: Qianxun Console
app.subtitle: Daemon · Stage 9c
panel.llm.title: LLM Providers
panel.llm.desc: Manage LLM model integrations (add / edit / switch / test)
panel.skills.title: Skills
panel.skills.desc: Skills are markdown + frontmatter from .qianxun/skills/ directory.
panel.skills.empty_desc: Drop markdown + frontmatter into .qianxun/skills/, then click 「Reload」
panel.mcp.title: MCP Servers
panel.mcp.desc: Manage Model Context Protocol server configs (stdio / http)
panel.tools.title: Tools
panel.tools.desc: View / invoke built-in tools (direct, no LLM)
panel.memory.title: Memory
panel.memory.search_placeholder: Type a keyword to search observations…
panel.memory.empty_sessions_desc: Memory is written automatically as conversations progress
panel.sessions.title: Chat Sessions
panel.sessions.desc: View / pause / cancel / delete chat sessions on this daemon
panel.config.title: Config
panel.config.desc: View / edit the active ResolvedConfig of the daemon
panel.config.readonly: Read-only mode — editing arrives in Stage 7c
panel.config.reload_warn: Some changes need a daemon restart
panel.system.title: System
panel.system.desc: Daemon health / resources / active connections / logs
settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Theme / language / admin token / about — all local config
settings.theme.title: Appearance
settings.theme.desc: Light / Dark / follow system. Applies immediately, persisted in your browser.
settings.theme.light_desc: Force Light mode, ignore system preference
settings.theme.dark_desc: Force Dark mode, ignore system preference
settings.theme.system_desc: Switch with the OS light/dark setting automatically
settings.language.title: Interface language
settings.language.desc: Switch the panel and menu language. Applies immediately, persisted in your browser.
settings.token.title: Admin Token
settings.token.desc: JWT used for current login, stored in browser localStorage. Rotating invalidates the old token and requires re-authentication.
settings.token.none: Not configured — open the token dialog
settings.token.rotate_success: Token rotated, old token is now invalid
settings.token.revoke_confirm: Revoke this token? You will need to re-authenticate to continue.
settings.about.title: About Qianxun
settings.about.desc: Qianxun (千寻) is a local-first personal AI coding & assistant system. This process is the daemon runtime.
